description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, clean geometric lines, and a mix of white and natural wood exterior finishes. The front facade features large windows, a prominent entryway with a covered porch, and a driveway leading to a garage. Lush landscaping with palm trees and hedges surrounds the property, providing privacy and a touch of greenery. The rear of the house includes a private pool area and additional outdoor living space, visible from the upper and lower levels. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and views. The overall design emphasizes openness, functionality, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes, surrounded by palm trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and prominent landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, flat roof, and minimal window openings on this facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool area, and extensive greenery along the property line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, additional landscaping, and the driveway curving toward the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a modern door, steps, and a small porch area integrated with landscaping
